title: So You Want To Be A Criminal? An Underworld Primer
content:
{{Top|rwm|ref|italics=1}}
'''''So You Want To Be A Criminal? An Underworld Primer''''' is an online supplement to ''[[Underworld: A Galaxy of Scum and Villainy]]'' in [[Star Wars Insider 89|''Star Wars Insider'' 89]]. The article is written by [[Pablo Hidalgo]], and is an exclusive [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|Hyperspace]] publication.

==Contents==
*[[Assassin/Legends|Assassin]]
*[[Black marketeer]]
*[[Forger (profession)/Legends|Counterfeiter]]
*Enforcer
*[[Gambler/Legends|Gambler]]
*[[Grafter]]
*[[Information broker/Legends|Infochant]]
*[[Loan shark]]
*[[Outlaw tech/Legends|Outlaw tech]]
*[[Pirate/Legends|Pirate]]
*[[Slaver/Legends|Slaver]]
*[[Slicer/Legends|Slicer]]
*[[Smuggler/Legends|Smuggler]]
